whyTiram.heading: Why Indian businesses choose Tiram
whyTiram.intro: Tiram exists to make your business healthier — not just to print invoices. Five ways that shows up every day at Indian counters and branches.

items.title: One tool, end-to-end
items.body: GST invoicing, inventory, pending dues, GSTR-ready reports, and staff in one place — not a ledger app plus a billing app plus a spreadsheet. Fewer reconciliation gaps, one source of truth, one bill at the end of the month.

items.title: Grows from one counter to many branches
items.body: Multi-organization, multi-branch, multi-warehouse, and role-based staff are built in from day one. Open a second counter in Chennai, add a godown in Hyderabad, hire a cashier in Madurai — no painful migration to a bigger tool later.

items.title: Live in minutes, not months
items.body: Sensible defaults for GST, UPI, and Tamil thermal receipts. No consultant rollout, no implementation phase. You are billing before the next stock truck arrives.

items.title: Decisions, not just data entry
items.body: Ageing dues, low-stock alerts, slow-moving items, branch-wise profit, and GST exposure — surfaced where the owner can act on them. Catch problems weeks earlier instead of finding out at year-end or filing month.

items.title: Cash health, not just invoices
items.body: UPI follow-ups, payment allocation, defaulter views, and ageing buckets are baked in. Faster collections, less working capital locked up in pending — the part of business improvement most billing tools ignore.

faq.heading: Questions, answered
faq.intro: Short answers. If you want a longer one, write to us.

items.q: Is Tiram GST-ready out of the box?
items.a: Yes. GSTIN validation at customer creation, HSN/SAC at line level, automatic CGST/SGST/IGST based on place of supply, and FY-aware period reports — Tiram is built around Indian GST from day one, not adapted to it.

items.q: Can I export GSTR-1 and GSTR-3B?
items.a: Yes. Tiram produces GSTR-1 and GSTR-3B period exports in formats your CA can hand in. Daily and monthly GST exposure dashboards are part of the standard plan.

Tiram captures everything e-invoicing needs (GSTIN, HSN/SAC, place of supply, line-level tax). Direct IRP submission with IRN return is on the active roadmap — talk to us if you need it now and we'll align timelines.
Yes. Save the business UPI ID, mark invoices paid by UPI in one tap, and send follow-ups for pending. UPI is a first-class payment mode — not just a free-text note on the invoice.

items.q: Can I print Tamil thermal receipts?
items.a: Yes. Tiram supports browser printing for invoices and ESC/POS thermal printer setup for counter receipts, with Tamil-friendly raster rendering where the printer setup supports it. Hindi and other Indian scripts roll out next.

items.q: Can I run multiple branches and warehouses?
items.a: Yes. Multi-organization, multi-branch, multi-warehouse, one-tap branch transfers, and role-based staff access are built in. Same data model whether you have one counter or twenty.

items.q: Can I switch from Tally, Vyapar, or KhataBook?
items.a: Yes. Bulk-import products and customers from a spreadsheet exported from Tally, Vyapar, KhataBook, QuickBooks, Zoho Books, or anything else. Reach out if you need help with the migration.

items.q: Is there an offline desktop app for slow-internet counters?
items.a: Yes. Offline desktop app for Windows and Mac — useful for power-cut-prone counters, godowns with patchy internet, or villages where mobile data drops. Contact the Tiram team for desktop activation.

items.q: Is there a Tiram mobile app?
items.a: The Tiram mobile app is under development. Today, businesses run on the cloud web app or the offline desktop app for Windows and Mac. Most counters use the cloud app on a tablet at the counter.
Yes. Every business is fully isolated — no shared rows. Authentication is industry-standard, data is encrypted in transit, and only the people you invite can see your books and GST reports.

items.q: What does Tiram cost in INR?
items.a: The Standard plan is ₹249 per user per month, exclusive of GST. Annual billing waives 2 months — yearly billing charges 10 months. A 30-day free trial is available without a credit card.

items.q: Do you offer onboarding for chains and distributors?
items.a: Yes. We help chains and distributors set up multi-org and multi-branch structures, migrate existing books, train staff, and integrate with the rest of your stack. Talk to us at tiram.business@gmail.com.
